title: Joseph / Yusuf
similarities: Joseph is favored by his father.
He rises to power in Egypt.

differences.description: The Qur’an presents the Joseph story as one unified surah with a strong moral and spiritual arc.
The Torah spreads Joseph’s story across multiple Genesis chapters.

commentary_notes: Joseph serves as a model of patient trust amid injustice.
Comparative reading reveals different theological emphases on providence and repentance.
